title: Abou Ben Adhem by Leigh Hunt | Summary in Hindi | Class 6
description:
Faith, Love, and Humanity. “Abou Ben Adhem” is a short, fable-like poem that suggests people can best express love for God by simply loving their fellow human beings. ... The poem ultimately argues that love of humankind is the love of God—because people are God's creation
